project.name: Open DroneLog
project.description: Local-first drone flight log viewer and analyzer with telemetry charts, 3D flight maps, and analytics. Supports DJI, Litchi CSV, and Airdata CSV formats. Available as a Tauri v2 desktop app or a Docker-deployable web app.

frontend.i18n: i18next (11 locales: en, de, es, fr, it, ja, ko, nl, pl, pt, zh)

backend.csv_parsers: Custom Litchi, Airdata, and DroneLogbook CSV parsers

desktop.description: Tauri v2 desktop app using IPC commands

web_docker.description: Axum REST API server with Nginx reverse proxy for Docker/web deployment

architecture.frontend_backend_bridge: src/lib/api.ts — unified adapter that routes to invoke() for Tauri or fetch() for web. All @tauri-apps imports are lazy/dynamic. Profile session tokens use a hybrid sessionStorage/localStorage strategy (tab-scoped reads with persistent fallback) via getProfileKey/setProfileKey/removeProfileKey helpers.

import: User selects file(s) via native dialog (desktop) or HTML input / drag-drop (web)
File routed to parser: DJI .txt → parser.rs, Litchi .csv → litchi_parser.rs, Airdata .csv → airdata_parser.rs, DroneLogbook CSV → dronelogbook_parser.rs
Parser runs in spawn_blocking with catch_unwind and 40s timeout for crash safety
Telemetry validated: GPS range (±90/±180), altitude <10km, speed <100 m/s, corrupt frames skipped
DJI V13+ logs require keychain decryption from DJI API; keys cached locally for offline reuse
Duplicate check: drone_serial + battery_serial + exact start_time match → skip
Flight metadata inserted into flights table
Telemetry bulk inserted via DuckDB Appender (column order enforced)
Smart tags generated if enabled (flight characteristics + offline reverse geocoding)
Saved user customizations (display_name, notes, color, manual tags) restored from flight_customizations overlay by file_hash match
On telemetry insert failure, flight metadata is automatically cleaned up
query: Frontend calls selectFlight() → checks in-memory LRU cache (max 10 flights)
On cache miss: api.getFlightData() → backend get_flight_by_id()
Telemetry downsampled to ~5000 points (1s buckets) if exceeding threshold
Response cached in frontend store for instant re-selection
Frontend converts units (metric/imperial) and renders charts + map

modules.main.rs: Entry point; feature-gated Tauri commands (desktop) or run_web() (Docker)
modules.server.rs: Axum REST API router with all HTTP endpoints mirroring Tauri commands
modules.database.rs: DuckDB connection manager, schema creation, migrations, CRUD operations, backup/restore, and sync blacklist persistence
modules.parser.rs: DJI log parser wrapper, telemetry extraction, smart tag generation, reverse geocoding, flight message extraction
modules.litchi_parser.rs: Litchi CSV parser with auto unit detection (feet/meters, mph/m/s)
modules.airdata_parser.rs: Airdata CSV parser with comprehensive field mapping
modules.dronelogbook_parser.rs: Re-import parser for Open DroneLog CSV exports (preserves notes, colors)
modules.models.rs: Shared data structures (Flight, TelemetryPoint, FlightMessage, OverviewStats, etc.)
modules.api.rs: DJI API key management and keychain fetching
modules.profile_auth.rs: Per-profile password hashing and verification using argon2id. Stores hashes in profile_auth.json.
modules.session_store.rs: In-memory session token management for web mode. 256-bit tokens, 24h TTL, 5-attempt lockout with 60s cooldown.

components.dashboard/Dashboard.tsx: Main layout: sidebar + content panel, view toggle (Flights/Overview), resizable panels
components.dashboard/FlightList.tsx: Flight list sidebar with search, sort, filters, keyboard navigation, context menu, bulk operations
components.dashboard/FlightStats.tsx: Selected flight stats bar with metrics, tags, weather button, export dropdown
components.dashboard/FlightImporter.tsx: File import area with drag-drop, browse, batch progress, manual entry button, sync button (web)
components.dashboard/Overview.tsx: Overview dashboard: stats cards, activity heatmap, pie charts, cluster map, battery health, maintenance tracking
components.dashboard/SettingsModal.tsx: Two-column settings: Units, Theme, Language, Time Format, Smart Tags, Profile Password (set/change/remove), API Key, Badge, Backup/Restore, Delete
components.dashboard/WeatherModal.tsx: Historical weather data display (via portal to body)
components.dashboard/FlightMessagesModal.tsx: Scrollable list of flight tips/warnings with timestamps and color coding
components.dashboard/FlightClusterMap.tsx: Overview map with flight location clusters, optional heatmap layer, and map area filter
components.dashboard/ColorPickerModal.tsx: Color picker for assigning custom colors to flights
components.charts/TelemetryCharts.tsx: Synchronized ECharts panels with configurable field selection
components.map/FlightMap.tsx: 3D flight map with deck.gl overlay, replay system, telemetry overlay, RC joystick visualization
components.ui/Select.tsx: Searchable dropdown with keyboard navigation and multi-select support
components.ui/PasswordInput.tsx: Reusable password input with eye toggle for visibility
components.ui/DatePickerPopover.tsx: Reusable calendar popover for single and range selection with typed YYYY-MM-DD inputs and Go action

state.stores/flightStore.ts: Zustand store: flights, telemetry cache, filters, tags, equipment names, theme, units, language, supporter badge, maintenance, map state. Syncs with localStorage and database API.

lib.api.ts: Backend adapter: invoke() for Tauri, fetch() for web. Unified interface for all backend operations. Includes hybrid sessionStorage/localStorage profile key helpers (getProfileKey, setProfileKey, removeProfileKey) and an onSessionExpired callback that triggers automatic logout on 401.
lib.exportUtils.ts: Client-side export generators for CSV, JSON, GPX, KML, Summary CSV, and bulk ZIP
lib.htmlReportBuilder.ts: A4-width HTML report generator with day grouping and weather data
lib.mapStyles.ts: Map style definitions for Satellite, Topographic, and OpenStreetMap views
lib.utils.ts: Unit conversion, date formatting, and general utilities
lib.weather.ts: Weather API integration for historical flight weather data

types.types/index.ts: TypeScript interfaces matching Rust models (Flight, TelemetryData, FlightMessage, OverviewStats, etc.)

i18n.locales/: Translation JSON files for 11 languages (en, de, es, fr, it, ja, ko, nl, pl, pt, zh)

docker.docker-compose.yml: Production deployment with pre-built GHCR image
docker.docker/nginx.conf: Nginx reverse proxy routing /api/* to Axum backend. Includes security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy).

ci..github/workflows/build.yml: Tauri desktop builds on release (Linux, Windows, macOS)
ci..github/workflows/docker.yml: Docker image build and push to GHCR on release
ci..woodpecker/docker.yml: Codeberg CI: Docker builds with versioned tags, nightly builds

config_files.parsers.json: Optional external parser plugin configuration file (desktop app-data path or /data/drone-logbook/parsers.json in Docker/web)
config_files.config.json: Local config (API key, smart tags setting) — stored in app data dir
config_files.profile_auth.json: Per-profile argon2id password hashes — stored in app data dir
config_files.context.json: Machine-readable project context for LLM reference (gitignored)

flights.description: Flight metadata — one row per imported or manually created flight
columns: file_hash (VARCHAR — SHA256, unique constraint for duplicate detection)
cycle_count (INTEGER — battery charge cycle count from DJI SmartBatteryStatic loop_times)

telemetry.description: Per-frame telemetry data — many rows per flight, bulk inserted via DuckDB Appender
columns: battery_full_capacity (FLOAT — battery design/full charge capacity in mAh)
battery_remained_capacity (FLOAT — remaining usable battery capacity in mAh)
notes: Column order is strictly enforced; mismatches trigger automatic rebuild
Latitude/longitude use DOUBLE precision; other metrics use FLOAT for ~50% storage reduction
Downsampled to ~5000 points (1s buckets) for frontend queries

flight_messages.description: In-flight tips, warnings, and state-change messages from DJI logs
notes: PK includes message text to support multiple messages at the same timestamp

keychains.description: Cached DJI encryption keys for offline log decryption

equipment_names.description: Custom display names for drones and batteries (cross-device sync)

settings.description: Key-value store for app flags (e.g., duplicate_checked, customizations_backfilled)

flight_customizations.description: Persistent user-edited metadata overlay keyed by file_hash. Survives delete-all and individual flight deletion + reimport cycles. Write-through: updated on every user edit to display_name, notes, color, or manual tags. On reimport, saved customizations are automatically restored by matching file_hash.
columns: file_hash (VARCHAR PK — SHA256 of original log file)
manual_tags (VARCHAR — JSON array of manual tag strings)
notes: Manual-entry flights (no file_hash) are skipped — no customizations stored
Backfilled on first startup from existing flights with user-modified data

sync_blacklist.description: Per-profile server-side blacklist of deleted file hashes used by sync to skip re-importing previously deleted logs.
columns: file_hash (VARCHAR PK — SHA256 hash of original log file)
notes: Checked by /api/sync/files, /api/sync/file, /api/sync, and scheduled sync jobs
Manual drag-drop/browse import removes the matching hash from blacklist on successful import

database.migrations: Schema migrations run on startup — add missing columns, type upgrades (DOUBLE→FLOAT), primary key expansions, flight_customizations backfill. Non-destructive: never drops existing data.
database.backup_format: Gzip-compressed tar archive of Parquet files (flights, telemetry, flight_tags, keychains, flight_messages, equipment_names, flight_customizations). Restore uses upsert semantics.

supported_formats: DJI flight logs (.txt) — parsed via dji-log-parser, supports V13+ encrypted logs
Litchi CSV exports — auto-detects units from column headers, maps numeric drone type codes
Airdata CSV exports — comprehensive field mapping with unit detection
Open DroneLog CSV re-import — preserves notes, colors, and metadata
import_and_parsing.third_party_support: Dronelink and DroneDeploy logs supported via DJIFly department fallback. Auto-tagged with 'M-SDK'.
import_and_parsing.deduplication: Dual-layer: file hash (SHA256) prevents re-importing the same file; flight signature (drone_serial + battery_serial + exact start_time) prevents importing the same flight from different export versions.
import_and_parsing.batch_import: Multi-file selection with per-file progress counter (X of Y), cooldown between files, duplicate skip tracking.
import_and_parsing.folder_sync: Web/Docker mode: mount a folder via SYNC_LOGS_PATH, import unprocessed files manually or on a cron schedule (SYNC_INTERVAL). Sync blacklist is persisted server-side in DuckDB (per profile) and honored by all sync paths.
import_and_parsing.keep_uploaded_files: Optional feature to retain copies of log files with SHA256 hash-based filename deduplication. Enabled by default on desktop.
import_and_parsing.manual_entry: Create flight records without log files — collects aircraft, serials, coordinates, duration, optional distance/altitude/notes. Auto-tagged 'Manual Entry'. Date pickers support typed YYYY-MM-DD quick entry.
import_and_parsing.external_parser_plugins: Load custom external parser plugins via parsers.json (desktop and web/docker supported paths).
import_and_parsing.customization_persistence: User-edited flight names, notes, colors, and manual tags are persisted in a flight_customizations overlay table keyed by file_hash (SHA256). On delete + reimport (individual or bulk), customizations are automatically restored. Write-through on every edit. One-time backfill migration captures existing data on upgrade. Manual-entry flights (no file_hash) are excluded.

profiles.description: Multiple named profiles with isolated databases, config, uploads, and sync folders. Managed from the profile selector dropdown.
profiles.per_profile_isolation: Each profile has its own DuckDB database, config.json, uploaded/ folder, and sync path (within the data directory).
profiles.password_protection: Optional argon2id-hashed password per profile (including default). Set/change/remove via Settings. Session-based auth in web mode.
profiles.master_password: PROFILE_CREATION_PASS env var gates creation and deletion in web/Docker mode.
profiles.session_management: Web mode issues 256-bit session tokens (24h TTL, configurable via SESSION_TTL_HOURS). Tokens use a hybrid storage strategy: sessionStorage for per-tab isolation, localStorage as a persistent fallback so sessions survive browser restarts. On 401, the token is auto-cleared and the login overlay is shown.
profiles.desktop_locking: Desktop profiles auto-lock on app close. lock_profile, unlock_profile, and is_app_locked Tauri commands manage the lock state. The InitializationOverlay prompts for re-authentication.
profiles.lockout: 5 consecutive failed attempts lock the profile for 60 seconds.

map.engine: MapLibre GL with deck.gl overlay via MapboxOverlay
map.flight_path: 3D Catmull-Rom spline-smoothed path with shadow layer, gradient coloring, and start/end/home markers. Track downsampled to 3000 points before smoothing; segments batched by color similarity (threshold ≤12 per channel, batch size 80) for GPU efficiency.
map.terrain: 3D terrain via MapLibre DEM (maxzoom 12), minimum zoom level 10
map.settings_panel: Collapsible panel: color-by, aircraft toggle, media events toggle, tooltip toggle, line thickness (1-5)

replay.aircraft_marker: 3D-aware ScatterplotLayer marker following path at correct altitude
replay.telemetry_overlay: Live-interpolated height, speed, distance, battery (color-coded), voltage, temp, satellites, attitude, coordinates
replay.rc_joystick_overlay: Progressive-fill bar indicators for throttle, rudder, elevator, aileron. Theme-aware (cyan on dark, dark slate on light).
replay.flight_messages_overlay: Toast notifications at bottom of map during replay when message timestamps are reached

flight_visualization.media_events: Photo and video capture points displayed on flight path (ScatterplotLayer icons)

interactions: Per-chart configurable field selection (max 4 fields, searchable dropdown, persisted to localStorage)
Hover tooltip with pill-style header across all charts
Chart sync with map replay position

smart_tags.location_tags: Offline reverse geocoding: country and continent from takeoff coordinates (via reverse_geocoder crate with bundled GeoNames dataset)
smart_tags.manual_tags: User-created violet capsules. Add via FlightStats inline input with autocomplete.
smart_tags.tag_types: Auto tags (teal capsules) vs manual tags (violet capsules). Configurable per-type enable/disable.
smart_tags.bulk_operations: 'Untag filtered' removes selected tags from all filtered flights. 'Bulk tag filtered' adds a manual tag to all filtered flights.

organization.color_management: Assign custom hex colors to flights. Color-based sorting and filtering in flight list.

flight_list.display: Compact list with display name, date, duration, distance subtitle. Inline rename (pencil icon) and delete (trash icon).
flight_list.sorting: By name, date, duration, distance, or color. Ascending/descending toggle.
flight_list.keyboard_navigation: Up/Down arrows browse, Enter selects and loads. Auto-clear selection when filtered out.
flight_list.context_menu: Rename, Delete, Regenerate Smart Tags, Generate FlyCard, Export (CSV/JSON/GPX/KML)

types: Date range (calendar picker with quick YYYY-MM-DD start/end inputs + Go)
filters.inversion: Filter inversion button: individually negates each active filter using AND logic (NOT A AND NOT B).
filters.auto_refresh: Slider ranges and dropdown options auto-refresh after flight deletion.

overview_dashboard.activity_heatmap: 365-day 7×52 grid showing flight counts per day. Double-click to filter to that date.
overview_dashboard.charts: Donut charts: flights by drone model, battery serial, and duration bucket (Short <10min, Mid 10-20min, Long >20min). Radial polar chart: flights by time of day (24 segments, local hour estimated from takeoff longitude).
overview_dashboard.cluster_map: MapLibre map with clustered flight locations and optional heatmap layer (toggle). Click clusters to zoom. Map area filter toggle with green glow border.
overview_dashboard.top_flights: Top 3 longest (by duration) and top 3 furthest (by distance from home).
overview_dashboard.battery_health: Per-battery health bars (sorted by health %, lowest first), inline rename, per-minute usage history plot (scatter + smoothed line) with zoom slider. Shows cycle count when available from DJI SmartBatteryStatic data, otherwise falls back to flight count. Battery Capacity History chart: multi-select dropdown to pick batteries, scatter + smooth-line plot of max full-charge capacity per flight over time (y-axis min 250 mAh, dynamic max), defaults to most recently used battery, selected batteries sorted to top of dropdown, scrollable legend.
overview_dashboard.maintenance_tracking: Configurable flight and airtime thresholds for batteries and aircraft. Color-coded progress bars (green <60%, yellow 60-74%, orange 75-89%, red 90%+). Date-based maintenance recording.
overview_dashboard.filter_sync: Overview uses sidebar-filtered flight IDs from Zustand store (sidebarFilteredFlightIds) instead of its own filter bar.

flight_messages.sources: DJI AppTip/AppWarn records from parsed frames + state-change tracking (warning flags, voltage alerts, flight mode changes, GPS state changes, battery level warnings)
flight_messages.display: Chat-bubble icon with red count badge in map header. FlightMessagesModal with scrollable color-coded list (blue=tip, amber=warn).
flight_messages.replay_integration: Active message toast overlay at bottom of map during flight replay.

single_flight: CSV (all telemetry + cell_voltages as JSON array)
KML (absolute altitude mode with fallback: altitude → height → vps_height → 0)
exports.bulk: ZIP archive of selected export format for all filtered flights
exports.summary_csv: Aggregate CSV with one row per flight (metadata only)
exports.flycard: 1080×1080 shareable image with map background, flight path overlay, and stats. Uses html2canvas. Desktop uses native save dialog.
exports.html_report: A4-width print-ready regulation report. Configurable title, pilot name, field groups (General, Equipment, Stats, Battery, Weather, Media). Grouped by day with subtotals. Print as PDF via Ctrl+P. Preferences persist across sessions.
exports.manual_entry_exports: CSV: single row with home coordinates. GPX: waypoint. KML: point placemark.

backup_and_restore.format: Gzip-compressed tar archive (.backup) of Parquet files
backup_and_restore.restore: Upsert semantics (delete-then-insert for flights/telemetry, INSERT OR REPLACE for keychains, equipment_names, and flight_customizations).

settings.smart_tags: Enable/disable auto-tagging, per-type configuration, regenerate for all flights, remove all auto tags
settings.api_key: DJI API key management: personal key, default key, or remove. Stored in config.json.
settings.keep_uploaded_files: Toggle + folder picker (desktop only). Files stored with SHA256 hash filenames.
settings.profile_password: Set, change, or remove a password for the active profile. Uses api.setProfilePassword() and api.removeProfilePassword(). Protected profiles show a lock icon.
settings.app_info: Version display with automatic update check against GitHub releases. Green 'Latest' or amber 'Update to vX.X.X' badge.
settings.supporter_badge: SHA-256 verified activation code. Amber gradient badge in sidebar. Ko-fi donation linked.
settings.layout: Two-column modal (max-w-3xl): Left (Units, Theme, Language, Smart Tags, API Key) + Right (Donation, Badge, Info, Backup, Delete).

ui_polish.theming: CSS variables in src/index.css. body classes: theme-light / theme-dark. Light mode uses !important overrides. Instant theme switching.
ui_polish.mobile: Responsive layout with adjusted defaults: telemetry panel off on mobile, compact sidebar, adjusted banner. Map rendering optimized for mobile.
ui_polish.pwa: Progressive Web App manifest and apple touch icon for browser installation.
ui_polish.modals: Escape key closes modals. WeatherModal uses createPortal for proper stacking. Scrollbar suppression via modal-open class.
ui_polish.sidebar: Collapsible filter and import sections. Width persisted to localStorage. Import auto-collapses when flights exist.
ui_polish.single_instance: tauri-plugin-single-instance ensures only one desktop app window.

api_endpoints.note: Web/Docker mode only (Axum REST API). All endpoints mirror Tauri IPC commands. Frontend adapter in src/lib/api.ts handles both modes.
flight_management: GET    /api/flight_data         — Get flight telemetry (query: flight_id, max_points)
GET    /api/battery_capacity_history — Battery full-charge capacity history (query: battery_serial)
PUT    /api/flights/notes       — Update flight notes (JSON: flight_id, notes)
PUT    /api/flights/color       — Update flight color (JSON: flight_id, color)
tags: POST   /api/flights/tags/add    — Add manual tag (JSON: flight_id, tag)
POST   /api/regenerate_smart_tags            — Regenerate auto tags for all flights
settings: GET    /api/has_api_key              — Check if API key configured
POST   /api/settings/smart_tags      — Set smart tags enabled (JSON: enabled)
POST   /api/settings/enabled_tag_types  — Set enabled tag types (JSON: types)
equipment: GET    /api/equipment_names     — Get all custom display names
POST   /api/equipment_names     — Set name (JSON: serial, equipment_type, display_name)
sync: GET    /api/sync/config         — Get sync folder config (syncPath, syncInterval)
GET    /api/sync/blacklist      — List persisted sync blacklist hashes
POST   /api/sync/blacklist      — Add hash to sync blacklist (JSON: fileHash)
DELETE /api/sync/blacklist      — Remove hash from sync blacklist (query: file_hash)
GET    /api/sync/files          — List files not yet imported
profiles: GET    /api/profiles             — List profiles with password status ({name, hasPassword}[])
POST   /api/profiles/switch      — Create or switch profile (JSON: name, create?, password?, new_password?, master_password?). Returns {name, session?}
DELETE /api/profiles/delete       — Delete profile (query: name, password?, master_password?)
GET    /api/profiles/active       — Get current active profile name
POST   /api/profiles/set_password — Set or change profile password (JSON: profile, new_password, current_password?, session?)
POST   /api/profiles/remove_password — Remove profile password (JSON: profile, current_password)
GET    /api/profiles/has_master_password — Check if PROFILE_CREATION_PASS is configured

desktop: npm run tauri — Full Tauri dev mode
npm run tauri:nowatch — Dev without file watching
web: npm run dev:web — Web frontend dev server (with /api proxy)
cargo run --features web --no-default-features — Backend dev server
frontend_only: npm run dev — Vite dev server

docker: docker compose up -d — Run with pre-built GHCR image
docker compose -f docker-compose-build.yml up -d — Build from source
docker compose -f docker-compose-build.yml up --build -d — Force rebuild

environment_variables.RUST_LOG: Log level: debug, info, warn (default: info)
environment_variables.DJI_API_KEY: Override bundled DJI API key for better rate limits
environment_variables.SYNC_LOGS_PATH: Path to internal folder for automatic log import (e.g., /sync-logs)
environment_variables.KEEP_UPLOADED_FILES: When true (default), keeps copies of uploaded log files
environment_variables.PROFILE_CREATION_PASS: Master password for creating/deleting profiles in web/Docker mode. When unset, profile management is open.
environment_variables.SESSION_TTL_HOURS: Session token lifetime in hours (default: 24). After expiry the user must re-authenticate.

github_desktop_builds.output: Desktop binaries uploaded to GitHub Release

github_docker_builds.tags: Semver (e.g. 2.26.0, 2.26) + latest on release; custom tag on manual dispatch

codeberg_woodpecker.tags: auto_tag: versioned (e.g. 2.26.0, 2.26, 2) + latest on tag event
codeberg_woodpecker.notes: Includes nightly build workflow. Docker Hub login to avoid pull rate limits.

known_issues: macOS binaries are unsigned (no Apple Developer account); users need xattr -cr workaround.
Older DJI logs (pre-2020) may produce garbage telemetry values; parser validation filters these out.
Node engine warnings may appear for some transient packages; app still runs.
If import fails with column order mismatch, telemetry table rebuild should correct it automatically.

security.password_hashing: argon2id via the argon2 0.5 crate with default (RFC 9106) parameters
security.session_tokens: 256-bit cryptographically random tokens, base64url-encoded, 24-hour TTL, stored in-memory (lost on restart)
security.lockout: 5 consecutive failed password attempts lock the profile for 60 seconds
security.master_password: PROFILE_CREATION_PASS env var gates profile creation and deletion in web/Docker mode
security.transport: No built-in TLS — users MUST place a reverse proxy (Nginx, Caddy, Traefik) with TLS in front for internet-facing deployments
security.headers: Nginx config includes Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy
limitations: No TLS — passwords and tokens sent in plaintext over HTTP without a reverse proxy
Sessions are in-memory only; server restart invalidates all sessions
No global IP-based rate limiting (lockout is per-profile only)
No CSRF tokens; relies on same-origin policy and custom headers
Session store is not shared across multiple backend instances
